summary: The video introduces OAuth authentication patterns for custom MCP servers integrated with Autodesk Platform Services, focusing on two-legged OAuth (2LO), Secure Service Account (SSA), and three-legged OAuth, along with their use cases and potential challenges. It discusses accessing Autodesk services like OSS and Model Derivative APIs using these patterns and emphasizes the importance of security considerations when utilizing the three-legged pattern.
